title: Chainly: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Chainly gives your team one place to deploy contracts, track transactions and ship Web3 apps with confidence.
Stop wiring together nodes, indexers and dashboards. Chainly handles the chain so you can ship the product.
cards: Push smart contracts to any chain in seconds, no node setup required.
Static analysis flags risky patterns before they ever reach mainnet.
See wallet flows, gas usage and contract calls on live dashboards.
One API across Ethereum, L2s and the chains you add tomorrow.
Your keys stay yours, with hardware wallet and multisig support.
Query historical events without running your own indexer.

sections.text: Compile, simulate and deploy from a single flow. Verify contracts automatically and roll back safely if something looks off.
No more switching between block explorers. Every contract, wallet and event lives in one shared, searchable workspace.

sections.sub: No node ops, no infrastructure team required.
steps: Sign in with your wallet and create a workspace in seconds.
Push your code or start from an audited template.
Watch transactions roll in and monitor your dApp live.

sections.quote: We shipped our first L2 contract on Chainly in an afternoon and finally stopped babysitting our own nodes. The team trusts the data.
sections.author: Sample Person

sections.sub: Start free. Scale as your transaction volume grows.

items: Ethereum, major L2s and a growing list of EVM chains. New chains are added regularly.
Do you ever touch my keys?
No. Chainly is non-custodial, you sign with your own wallet or multisig at all times.
Can I deploy to testnets for free?
Yes. The Builder plan includes unlimited testnet deploys with no card required.
You pay a flat monthly fee per workspace, with usage-based add-ons. Cancel anytime.
Paid plans verify source on the block explorer right after each successful deploy.

sections.sub: Join thousands of builders who launch faster without running their own infrastructure.

sections.tagline: One workspace to deploy, monitor and scale your Web3 apps. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Chainly is a sample template with dummy content
